question: DinoBrain live Codex hook diagnostic probe.

items.title: Task: DinoBrain live Codex hook diagnostic probe.
Task: task-20260705-022738-QA-code-review-DinoBrain-v2-
items.summary: status=completed | Completed stability-focused QA/code review of DinoBrain v2 changes. Findings: Codex hook duplicate-lock path can skip preflight instead of fail-closing; Claude Code integration is MCP-only and does not enforce pre-response OS context; action-gate required-tool checks still cover only legacy tools; node lifecycle apply=true writes review records rather than executing merge/hold/delete/provenance rep

items.title: Task: QA/code review DinoBrain v2 changes comprehensively, focusing on stability of fail-closed pre-re
Task: Implement DinoBrain v2 foundations for mandatory pre-response OS context, improved retrieval, li
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Implemented DinoBrain OS v2 foundations: package/server/installer version bumped to 2.0.0, added fail-closed os_begin_task pre-response entrypoint, switched default retrieval to hybrid_contextual_v2, added action gates, node lifecycle application, durable source chunks/provenance links, feedback correction writeback, behavior evaluation, v2 Observatory status, and v2 regression

items.title: Task: task-20260705-053940-DinoBrain-OS-v2-P0-DB-03-DB-
items.summary: status=completed | Implemented DinoBrain OS v2 P0 improvements from the review report: honest lexical fallback retrieval mode, optional dense vector cosine retrieval, stopword/high-frequency token filtering, verified os_gate context evidence, sensitive prompt auto-escalation, event-backed memory audit artifact verification, SQLite/wiki index version bumps, v2.0.2 version bump, docs, and regression coverage.

items.title: Task: Verify whether the currently installed DinoBrain follows the full OS loop: Codex hook detection,
Task: Implement stability fixes from the DinoBrain v2 QA review and deploy the updated release.
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Implemented and deployed DinoBrain v2.0.1 stability fixes based on the QA review. Patched fail-closed Codex hook duplicate-lock behavior, added Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook registration and verification, expanded v2 action gates to the full OS tool contract, made behavior eval strict when golden cases are missing, added source chunk redaction/truncation guards, made node li
